metadata.description: v1 Phase A: team agrees to build a Streamlit dashboard, references an existing chart on screen.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: We need a dashboard for the activation funnel.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Streamlit is fine. We can host it on Modal.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: It should pull from the warehouse — Postgres replica.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Top metric: weekly activated users. Bar chart by week.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Plus a funnel chart for the four onboarding steps.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Look at this existing dashboard - we want similar layout, sidebar with filters.

utterances.speaker: B
utterances.text: Yes, sidebar layout is the right call.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: Owner: me. I'll have a draft by end of week.

utterances.speaker: A
utterances.text: To recap: Streamlit dashboard, Postgres replica source, weekly activated users bar chart, four-step funnel chart, sidebar filters for date and country, owner is me.

decisions.text: Build a Streamlit dashboard for the activation funnel
Source data from the Postgres replica
Include a weekly activated users bar chart and a four-step funnel chart
Sidebar layout with date-range and country filters
A is the owner; draft by end of week
